verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Glory, glory Lord! We give you glory Lord! Glory, glory Lord! You are a mighty God! Glory, glory Lord! We give you glory Lord! Glory, glory Lord! You are a mighty God!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nobody can't stop me from praising my Jesus, No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, nobody can't stop me.
